subject: Re: The error information in the worker_0_crash.txt in M refinement.
body:
After what step does this file get updated? If it appears after the
determining memory step, it is entirely normal
Best,
Pranav
--
Pranav Shah
Postdoctoral Research Fellow.

Division of Structural Biology,
Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
University of Oxford,
Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
UK



On Wed, May 5, 2021 at 1:32 PM yuqi zhang <824586412@qq.com> wrote:
>
>
> I suspected that GPU memory was not enough. How can I deal with that?
>
> Could I delete some particles in the final data.star? Or I have to run the relion refine with fewer particles.
> 在2021年5月5日星期三 UTC+8 下午7:33:39<yuqi zhang> 写道：
>>
>> When I did the subtomo-averaging refinement after relion's results, M reported this error information in the worker_0_crash.txt.
>>
>> System.Exception: cudaErrorMemoryAllocation
>>    at Warp.GPU.CheckGPUExceptions() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\GPU.cs:line 1175
>>    at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 322
>>
>> My GPU was Quadro GV100 32GB*2. The memory was 128 GB.
>
> --
